positive: A minimalist, highly detailed illustration of a stylized mountain landscape at sunrise. The design features clean, thick silhouettes of various peaks and foothills against a dramatically gradient sky of burnt orange, deep indigo, and soft peach. Integrate abstract geometric elements like radiating sunbeams and simple geometric clouds. The composition must be perfectly centered and suitable for repeating seamless pattern prints, designed with bold, flat color blocking and a modern, graphic aesthetic. Vector art style, perfect for screen printing on apparel, high contrast, isolated white background to maximize versatility.
